title: 001199 with n_ens48 for both RealMLP seeds
summary: Run a heavy n_ens=48 RealMLP core inside the 001199 CatBoost-corrected system.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Set n_ens=48 for both RealMLP seeds, with no other changes. If runtime becomes excessive, fail clearly rather than changing the hypothesis.
expected_effect: Probe the upper end of RealMLP variance reduction on available GPU time.
risk: Very high runtime and likely diminishing returns.
